strategist.description: Generates campaign blueprints from research inputs

audience-intel.description: Builds 5 ICP profiles for Malaga + Ellenbrook demographics

competitor-spy.description: Full competitor analysis: Revo, Ryderwear, Anytime, Snap, World Gym

content-agent.description: Social media content: weekly plans, reels, ad copy, competitor responses

content-intel.description: Monitors top fitness content AU — hooks, formats, emotion triggers

research-agent.description: Competitor monitor, fitness trends, PESTLE/SWOT updates

paid-ads.description: Google + Meta ad copy from campaign blueprint
paid-ads.input_required: outputs/blueprints/ must have a blueprint first

performance.description: Weekly performance analysis: Meta CPM/CPC/CPL, Google CTR/CPC

seo-agent.description: Site audit, competitor SEO gap analysis, content strategy, reporting

team-commands.description: User-facing slash commands for team members without technical expertise

seo-blog-generator.description: Generate weekly SEO blog posts with topic rotation and data-driven keyword research

meeting-workflow.description: Management meeting workflow: recommendations, minutes, action tracking

seo-site-audit.description: Runs a targeted technical + on-page SEO audit on CB247 pages. Lighter than the full seo-agent pipeline — use for quick audits, fix lists, and single-page checks. For full keyword strategy + content briefs + reporting, say 'run seo-agent'.

dashboard-design.description: Enforces CB247 dashboard design standards: teal/black/white only, no emojis, kanban fits screen. Auto-activates on all dashboard and UI work.
dashboard-design.priority: HIGH — overrides all other colour/layout decisions

humanizer.description: Removes 30 AI-writing patterns from any text. Mandatory post-processing step for all blogs and social content. Installed at ~/.claude/skills/humanizer/SKILL.md
humanizer.priority: MANDATORY — runs after every blog draft and content-agent output before saving
